attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables containing commands for clearing Windows Event Logs
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen
Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables containing many references to VEEAM. Observed in ransomware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects command variations typically used by ransomware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects Windows exceutables bypassing UAC using CMSTP COM interfaces. MITRE (T1218.003)
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables containing anti-forensic artifacts of deleting USN change journal. Observed in ransomware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET SCAN Behavioral Unusual Port 445 traffic Potential Scan or Infection
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> any 445 (msg:"ET SCAN Behavioral Unusual Port 445 traffic Potential Scan or Infection"; flow:to_server; flags: S,12; threshold: type both, track by_src, count 70 , seconds 60; reference:url,doc.emergingthreats.net/2001569; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2001569; rev:15; metadata:created_at 2010_07_30, former_category SCAN, updated_at 2017_05_11;)
